key.name: left-box-order
key.description: Order of items in the left box of the top bar.

key.name: center-box-order
key.description: Order of items in the center box of the top bar.

key.name: right-box-order
key.description: Order of items in the right box of the top bar.

key.name: family-order-task-up-ultralite
key.description: Order of Task Up UltraLite items within their group slot.

key.name: family-order-gsconnect
key.description: Order of GSConnect device items within their group slot.

key.name: family-order-tasks-in-panel
key.description: Order of Tasks in Panel items within their group slot.

key.name: item-creators
key.description: Persisted map of item role to the uuid of the extension that created it (or an empty string if confirmed to have no creator extension). Makes first-write-wins creator identification durable across restarts instead of re-deriving it, and closes the race window, every session.

key.name: appindicator-order-mode
key.description: Whether and how to order AppIndicator/KStatusNotifierItem (tray) items. "off" never touches them. "safe" places a newly created tray icon adjacent to the last-known tray icon once, without ever reparenting it again. "full" keeps a persisted custom order for tray icons, same as other top bar items, at the cost of the residual reparent-crash risk tray icons carry.
